raw_text: {"ranked": [{"track_id": "track_acoustic_wistful_a", "score": 8.6, "rationale": "Wistful tender acoustic with warm golden-hour grade matches the beach-sunset anniversary clips exactly; slot count of 7 fits the 4 long clips well.", "predicted_strengths": ["warm golden hour grade matches the footage", "slow pacing supports 6-7s handheld clips", "sentimental copy_tone reads against 'five years today' hook"]}, {"track_id": "track_cinematic_tender", "score": 8.3, "rationale": "Cinematic tender with reverent mood lifts the silhouette and hand-brushing clips into a more sweeping emotional register — distinct enough from the acoustic top pick that it earns the second slot over the near-identical acoustic alternative.", "predicted_strengths": ["distinct vibe from top pick — adds genuine top-K variety", "sweeping mood serves the silhouette clip", "medium pacing on 6 slots fits 4 long clips"]}, {"track_id": "track_acoustic_wistful_b", "score": 8.2, "rationale": "Scores within 0.5 of the top pick on identical labels (same vibe_tags, energy, pacing, copy_tone, grade) — ranked below cinematic on the diversity tiebreaker because two near-identical sentimental ballads in top-K is a worse outcome than one ballad + one cinematic.", "predicted_strengths": ["essentially interchangeable with top pick — useful fallback", "same golden-hour grade match", "works if user wants two acoustic variants for A/B"]}, {"track_id": "track_pop_radio", "score": 5.5, "rationale": "Hopeful upbeat pop reframes the anniversary as celebration rather than memory — viable variant but the high energy fights the slow-paced beach-walk footage.", "predicted_strengths": ["warm grade still aligns", "hopeful mood is a plausible alternate framing"]}, {"track_id": "track_hiphop_swagger", "score": 1.8, "rationale": "Swagger and street attitude are the wrong tonal universe for an intimate beach anniversary; saturated street grade fights the soft golden-hour clips.", "predicted_strengths": ["no real fit"]}]}
